attributes.name: Spec Definition for Card and Field Specifications
attributes.summary: The Spec export defines the data structure and presentation components for specifications of cards, fields, components, apps, and commands within the Cardstack platform. Its primary purpose is to facilitate the creation, editing, and display of detailed specifications and metadata, including summaries, related examples, modules, and associated code references. The specification components support viewing and editing modes, generate documentation (such as README sections), and include mechanisms for populating sample data and generating AI-suggested examples. Overall, it provides a comprehensive framework for managing and visualizing the detailed metadata and documentation of card definitions, ensuring consistency, clarity, and ease of editing within the platform.
